name: Retired Couple — Pension Income Splitting and Medical Expenses
description: Complete Margaret Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'margaret_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T1032 Joint Election to Split Pension Income; CRA Guide T4040 (RRSPs and Other Registered Plans for Retirement)
metadata.key_complexity: T1032 Pension Income Splitting; identifying eligible vs ineligible pension income (RRIF vs CPP/OAS); medical expense threshold calculation; Manitoba provincial credits.
